subject: [DCAE] Fix blueprint upload error
commit_message:
[DCAE] Fix blueprint upload error

Blueprint version format updated to resolve
INT type max value restriction

Change-Id: I72497304e7709a675ff8258537b4682eef18624f
Signed-off-by: vv770d <vv770d@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3077
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3028
Signed-off-by: vv770d <vv770d@att.com>

Patch Set 1:

note for smoke it shall be 100%
the 2 FAIL tests are jakarta tests
they are not filtered in the gating/istanbul as teh filter was based on pod name and not on env version var 
a patch is in progress to clarify the filtering

for ona-k8s => issue was due to deprecattion of kubernetes python client methods
fix done this morning and xtesting dockers regenerated

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> note for smoke it shall be 100%
> the 2 FAIL tests are jakarta tests
> they are not filtered in the gating/istanbul as teh filter was based on pod name and not on env version var 
> a patch is in progress to clarify the filtering
> 
> for ona-k8s => issue was due to deprecattion of kubernetes python client methods
> fix done this morning and xtesting dockers regenerated

Thanks Morgan for the note. 

The current gating test does not include the cloudify blueprint deployment - dcaemod,cmpv2, 5gbulkpm. Is it possible to retrigger/verify these test for this patch? Similar to https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/daily/onap_daily_pod4_istanbul/2022-02/15_03-39/
